news.t: JPMorgan Converts $950M to Active NY, CA Muni ETFs
How to tell if it is worth avoiding taxes with a municipal bond ETF

overview.description: The iShares California Muni Bond ETF (CMF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the ICE AMT-Free California Municipal index. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of investment-grade debt issued by California governments and agencies. Interest is exempt from US & California tax and from AMT. CMF was launched on Oct 4, 2007 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: JPMorgan Converts $950M to Active NY, CA Muni ETFs
data.text: This week J.P. Morgan Asset Management launched two actively managed municipal bond ETFs focused on California and New York debt, offering investors a way to earn tax-free income inside a more flexibl...
